title: paullinia hondurensis
intro: Paullinia hondurensis, also known as the Honduran guanabano or soursop, is a tropical vine native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Paullinia hondurensis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving mental clarity and focus, and supporting immune function. Paullinia hondurensis is often prepared as a tea, extract, or capsule, and can also be used in traditional herbal remedies, such as tinctures and infusions.
